## Email 1. Announce

**Subject A:** the real reason you don't post
**Subject B:** what should you post tomorrow?

**You don't have a posting problem.**

You have a "what do I even post today" problem.

You open the app. You stare at the blank box. You close it. Again.

Here's the fix: stop being the one who has to come up with the idea.

In 15 days you'll build a simple AI agent that does it for you. Every morning it finds a fresh idea for your business and writes you a ready-to-use prompt to make it.

No blank page. No "I'll post later."

30 minutes a day. Free with your membership. We start Sun Jun 21.

Doors open this weekend. Watch your inbox.

Matt

**P.S.** If you've ever closed the app because you didn't know what to say, the next email is for you.

---

## Email 2. Doors open

**Subject A:** doors are open. 15 days. one agent. $0.
**Subject B:** build the thing that kills the blank page

**Quick one.**

The Build Your First AI Marketing Agent challenge is open.

What you get: an agent that hands you a content idea every single morning, plus a ready-to-run prompt to make it. By Sun Jul 5, it's built and working.

What it costs: nothing. It's already in your membership.

What it takes: 30 minutes a day for 15 days. That's the whole deal.

And there's $1,000 in credits on the table for the best agents. $500, $300, $100, and a community-voted $100.

**[Join free →](https://TEAM-TO-ADD/registration)**

`<<SpotsRemaining>>` spots left. Doors shut Sat Jun 20 at 11:59pm.

Matt

**P.S.** Two dates you can't miss once you're in: a 2-minute video on Jun 28, and your final agent on Jul 4. Put them in your calendar now, thank me later.

## Email 3. Closing tonight

**Subject A:** closes tonight
**Subject B:** last call before the blank page wins again

**Short one, because you've got hours, not days.**

Registration closes tonight at 11:59pm.

One question decides it:

Do you post less than you want to, because you never know what to say?

If yes, this is the fix. You walk away with an agent that hands you the idea every morning.

If no, ignore me and carry on.

**[Join free →](https://TEAM-TO-ADD/registration)**

Matt

**P.S.** Next round isn't until later this year. Tonight is the door.

## Email 4. Gate 1, the video (Sun Jun 28, Day 8)

**Subject A:** day 8. don't go quiet now.
**Subject B:** 2 minutes stands between you and the prize

**You're halfway. This is where most people disappear.**

Not because the work got hard. Because they go quiet, fall a day behind, and feel too weird to come back.

So here's the move that keeps you in: a 2-minute video.

Phone. No editing. No script. Show your agent spit out one idea, then tell me the one thing tripping you up.

Post it in `#Day8` before midnight.

Miss it and you're out of the running for the $1,000 in credits. Hit it and you're locked in.

I reply to every single one.

Matt

**P.S.** Hate being on camera? So do I. Hit record, say two things, stop, post. Ninety seconds and you're safe.

---

## Email 5. Gate 2, final submission (Sat Jul 4, Day 14)

**Subject A:** submit tonight and you graduate
**Subject B:** don't let two weeks be for nothing

**Last step. Tonight.**

By 11:59pm, drop three things in `#Day14`:

1. Your agent (a link, or a 60 to 90 second screen recording)
2. Your one-page brief
3. One idea and prompt it gave you

Three separate boxes. A link or a file. Either works.

Submit and you graduate. Graduate and you're in for $1,000 in credits, announced live at the Summit on Wednesday.

Don't polish it. A working agent beats a perfect plan you never send.

**[Submit your agent →](https://TEAM-TO-ADD/submission-form)**

Matt

**P.S.** You just did two weeks of work. Don't skip the one step that counts.

**Subject A:** tomorrow: 3 agents built live + $1,000 in credits given away
**Subject B:** the reveal is tomorrow night

**Tomorrow night, three experts each build a different agent live, in front of you.**

A research agent that spies on your competitors. An image agent that makes your visuals. An agent that finds you customers without paid ads.

Then we give away the $1,000 in credits. Winners announced live.

You have to be in the room to win. No exceptions.

Wed Jul 8, 11:00pm to 2:00am SGT.

**[Save your seat →](https://TEAM-TO-ADD/zoom)**

Bring the agent you built. You'll make it better while you watch.

Matt

**P.S.** Even if you didn't finish, come anyway. You'll leave with three new agents you can copy.

## Notes for whoever sends these

- Read every email out loud before it goes. If you stumble, rewrite the line.
- Fill the links and the winner names before sending. Nothing fake ships.
- Keep the subject lines lowercase and short. They feel like a person, not a brand.

*AI SCHOOL · NAS.com · CONFIDENTIAL*
